name: @melbourneandrew/agent-memory-cli
description: Agent Memory: CLI, shared runtime, and local web UI for Backboard.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agent-memory-cli/core && npm run build --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs && npm run build --workspace @agent-memory-cli/cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @agent-memory-cli/core && npm run test --workspace @agent-memory-cli/cli && npm run test --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @agent-memory-cli/core && npm run lint --workspace @agent-memory-cli/cli && npm run lint --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @agent-memory-cli/core && npm run format --workspace @agent-memory-cli/cli && npm run format --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs --if-present
scripts.prepush: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
